title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 53/100 (building)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 53/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Good that Burnham is recognising that the fiscal rules for investment have *already* been loosened by Reeves and now take into account all financial assets. www.ft.com/content/dd3f...

items.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: As an economist, former FT journalist and now Labour MP, l don’t think the bond markets have to fear a change of Labour leadership.

The biggest problem for gilt investors and MPs alike is inflation – & it remains our...
